title: Res + `?` propagation across a fallible call
statement: From docs/specpack/idioms.md #1. Define `enum Res[T, E] { ok Ok(T), Err(E) }`, `enum MathErr { DivZero }`, `fn div(a: i64, b: i64) -> Res[i64, MathErr]` (Err on `b == 0`, else Ok of the quotient), and `fn div_then(a: i64, b: i64, c: i64) -> Res[i64, MathErr]` that computes `div(a, b)` then divides the result by `c`, using `?` to propagate the first error. Define only these items.
